list.name: ri
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(owner),''),'Unknown') AS ri FROM monitoring.fact_site_event ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.site_type::text FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.description FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(f.event_start_timestamp, $__interval), COUNT(*) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' AND s.description LIKE '${site}' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(f.event_start_timestamp, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0))/1000.0 AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' AND s.description LIKE '${site}' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT f.event_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') AS ri, s.site_type::text AS site_type, s.description AS site, f.execunitid AS monitoring_point, f.event_start_timestamp, f.event_end_timestamp, ROUND(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0)/1000.0,4) AS energy_kwh, ROUND(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0)/1000.0,4) AS cfp_kg, f.status FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') LIKE '${ri}' AND s.site_type::text LIKE '${site_type}' AND s.description LIKE '${site}' ORDER BY f.event_start_timestamp DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 500;
